title: Pfizer India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Pfizer India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Pfizer India Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pfizer India Digital Technologies:
Pfizer India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India Digital Technologies!
